title: Running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/SEC on a 13-year-old Xeon with no GPU
content: A developer repurposed a 13-year-old HP StoreVirtual storage box with dual Ivy Bridge Xeons (no GPU) and successfully runs Google's Gemma 4 26B model at 5 tokens/sec. The post details the extreme optimization techniques — AVX512-free quantization, memory mapping tricks, and OS-level tuning — needed to run modern LLMs on decade-old hardware.
quote: 13年老 Xeon 跑 Gemma 4，谷歌看了沉默，黄仁勋看了流泪——不，他笑出了声。

title: OpenAI loses trademark dispute at EU court
content: OpenAI has lost a legal challenge against the refusal to register the trademark "OPENAI" at the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO). The EU court ruled against OpenAI, marking a setback for the company's brand protection efforts in Europe.
quote: OpenAI 想当商标界的大模型，结果欧洲法院说：你先学会在场证明自己不是通用词汇。

title: CVE-2026-59208: Cross-Issuer Account Takeover in n8n
content: Security researcher discovered CVE-2026-59208, a cross-issuer account takeover vulnerability in n8n workflow automation platform that allows attackers to take over accounts across different issuers. Affects self-hosted n8n instances.
quote: n8n 爆出跨签发者账号接管漏洞，建议所有自称"低代码"的自动化工具有样学样，先爆为敬。

title: Show HN: StyleSeed – a design-rules engine so AI agents stop building generic UI
content: StyleSeed is a design-rules engine that teaches Claude Code, Codex and Cursor design judgment so AI agents stop building generic-looking UI. Comes with 74 rules, 48 components, 7 brand skins (Toss, Stripe, Linear, Notion, etc.), a named motion system, and 15 skills.
quote: AI 生成 UI 丑到忍无可忍？这位老哥做了个设计规则引擎来拯救 MCP Agent 的审美癌。

title: Nutlope/hallmark
content: Hallmark is an open-source AI detection and content verification tool. It helps identify AI-generated content and verify content authenticity across various platforms.
quote: 又一个 AI 检测 Hallmark 项目——等等，这个跟其他 200 个有什么区别？

title: Building an AI Agent That Knows When Not to Guess (Qwen + MCP)
content: A payment landed for exactly half an invoice's value. The payer's email matched the customer on file. The reference generated by Paystack — the Stripe-equivalent payment processor across Africa didn't
quote: 用 Qwen + MCP 教 AI 知道什么时候不该猜——这比教有些产品经理有用多了。

title: AI Unveils 15-Year-Old Linux Kernel Root Vulnerability
content: Fifteen years hidden, then an AI found it Nebula Security's AI platform VEGA just surfaced GhostLock — a use-after-free in the Linux kernel's futex implementation that's been sitting in the source t
quote: AI 挖出 15 年历史的 Linux 内核漏洞，人类安全研究员表示：这碗饭不好抢啊。

title: Building a Population Health Risk Stratification Pipeline for MA Plans
content: Risk stratification sounds like a data-science buzzword until you have to build the thing. For a Medicare Advantage plan, it's a concrete pipeline: take a population of members, score each one's clini
quote: 把医疗数据上流水线，听起来像个好主意——直到 HIPAA 来找你喝茶。

title: 支撑亿级文件规模：途虎养车 JuiceFS + Ceph RADOS 存储优化实践 - JuiceFS
content: 途虎养车是一家线上线下一体化汽车服务平台。截至 2025 年底，平台注册用户达 1.623 亿，工场店达到 8008 家。随着业务规模持续扩大，途虎养车的底层基础设施需要支撑更复杂的数据管理和计算场景。此前，平台长期并存 NFS、Alluxio、MinIO、SeaweedFS 等多套存储系统，存在架
quote: 途虎养车用 JuiceFS + Ceph 撑亿级文件，修车师傅看了直呼内行，运维看了想跳槽。

title: 数据库关联表查询出重复数据的原因分析与解决 - leonshi
content: 最近工作中遇到用关联的数据库查询出两条重复的数据，导致统计数据时有偏差，所以就想着写篇文章记录一下，并供遇到同样问题的小伙伴参考示例sql: select a.* from corp_info a left join corp_org b on a.org_no =b.org_no and a.st
quote: 数据库关联查询出重复数据？DBA 的日常就是不断发现别人写错 JOIN 的手艺。

title: 我让 AI 重构 5000 行 Java 代码，最后一周都在修它造的 Bug - 码哥字节
content: 老板说："用 AI 把这坨屎山重构掉，现在工具这么好，应该很快。" 我当时点了头。 这是我接手的一个运行了 6 年的 Spring Boot 单体服务，核心模块 5000 行，最臃肿的那个类 1800 行，47 个方法堆在一起，没有注释，单测覆盖率 8%。前任的前任离职的时候留了一句话："这块别乱动
quote: AI 重写 5000 行 Java，然后 Developer 花一周修 AI 造的 Bug——经典"搬起石头砸自己脚"的 2026 版。

title: Excelize 开源社区荣获 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖
content: 2025 年 11 月 16 日，由红山开源平台主办的“2025 红山开源大会”，在北京香山颐和宾馆红山厅成功落下帷幕。为表彰在开源领域做出卓越贡献的项目，大会特别设立 2025 年度红山开源平台明星项目颁奖环节。 Excelize 开源社区荣获了 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖，活动详情详见文章：2025 红山开源大会圆满收官，共筑开源生态新未来 Excelize 是用于操作电子表格办公文档
quote: 开源社区拿红山奖，说明开源除了用爱发电，偶尔也能拿个电费补贴。
